\tzpentry{ID5491}{Target Quantum Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5491 introduces Target Quantum Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \min \int_0^T \|\rho(t)-\rho_{\mathrm{target}}\|_1\,dt \quad \text{s.t.}\quad \dot{\rho} = -\frac{i}{\hbar}[H_{\mathrm{sel}},\rho] + \mathcal{D}[\rho]. \end{align}
